info.title: Kleanet API
info.description: Middleware API for the Kleanet laundry-on-demand service (Yaoundé, Cameroon). Connects the Flutter mobile app to the Odoo 19 back-office.

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the provided E.164 phone number. Limited to 3 requests per 10-minute window per phone number.

post.summary: Verify OTP and return JWT tokens
post.description: Verifies the 6-digit OTP and returns access + refresh tokens. Creates a new Odoo partner if the phone number is not yet registered.
Verifies a Google id_token obtained by the Flutter app via the Google Sign-In SDK. Creates a new Odoo partner if the email is not yet registered.

id_token.description: Google id_token from the Flutter Google Sign-In SDK

post.description: Verifies a Facebook access_token obtained by the Flutter app via the Facebook Login SDK. Creates a new Odoo partner if the email is not yet registered.

access_token.description: Facebook access_token from the Flutter Facebook Login SDK

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token (30 min).
Revokes the provided refresh token in Redis. The access token remains valid until its natural expiry (30 min). Requires a valid Bearer access token in the Authorization header.

get.summary: Get garment types and pricing rules
get.description: Returns the full catalogue: garment types and pricing rules. Cached in Redis for 1 hour. Public — no authentication required.
Returns all active subscription plans. Cached in Redis for 1 hour. Public — no authentication required.

delete.description: Clears the Redis cache for both /services and /plans. The next request to either endpoint will re-fetch from Odoo. Requires a valid Bearer access token.

post.description: Creates a new laundry order with one or more lines. The partner_id is taken from the JWT — never passed in the body. Odoo computes unit prices and subtotals server-side.

lines.description: At least one order line required.

notes.description: Optional notes for the driver or team.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of the authenticated partner's orders, newest first.
Returns full detail for a specific order including lines. Returns 404 if the order does not exist or belongs to another partner.

post.summary: Create a pickup or delivery appointment
post.description: Books a new appointment for the authenticated partner. scheduled_from must be at least 2 hours from now. order_ids, if provided, must all belong to the authenticated partner.

scheduled_from.description: ISO 8601 datetime — minimum 2 hours from now.

scheduled_to.description: ISO 8601 datetime — optional end of the time slot.

order_ids.description: Laundry order IDs to link to this appointment.

notes.description: Optional notes for the driver or operations team.

get.description: Returns all appointments for the authenticated partner, newest first.
Returns the active or paused subscription for the authenticated partner. Returns { subscription: null } if the partner has no active subscription.

post.description: Creates a new subscription for the authenticated partner from the given plan. Returns 409 if the partner already has an active or paused subscription.

plan_id.description: ID of the subscription plan to subscribe to.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated partner.

delivery_location.description: Saved GPS location — null if not yet set.

patch.description: Updates name and/or email. At least one field must be provided. Returns 409 if the email is already linked to another account.

delivery_location.description: Saved GPS location — null if not yet set.

patch.description: Saves the partner GPS coordinates for pre-filling pickup address. Coordinates (0, 0) are rejected as they represent the Odoo unset default.

delivery_location.description: Saved GPS location — null if not yet set.

post.summary: Submit feedback for a delivered order
post.description: Creates a customer feedback entry for the given order. The order must be in delivered state and must belong to the authenticated partner. Only one feedback per order is allowed.

order_id.description: ID of the delivered order to review.

would_recommend.description: Whether the customer would recommend the service.

get.description: Returns all published customer-facing FAQs. Filter by category using the optional `category_id` query param. Results are served from Redis cache (TTL 1h). Invalidated by DELETE /api/v1/catalog/cache.
